_comment: FXC Field roster. Edit this list to add/remove people. 'owner' and 'pm' get FULL edit (everything). 'crew' get FIELD scope (active jobs only: gate boxes, readings, product, notes, advance the active flow). Keep names short — they appear on the role-picker tiles and get stamped onto every git commit. After editing, commit this file in GitHub Desktop (or re-upload to tiny.host) and crew will see the new tiles on their next cold open.
